semantic.role: Infrastructure facade module for prompt policy, validation, and parsing utilities. Provides a stable import surface for constants, parsers, and policy resolvers used in prompt validation tasks.
responsibilities: Re-export prompt policy constants (STRICT_VALIDATE_BUDGET_PROFILES, VALIDATE_POLICIES, PROMPT_BUDGET_PROFILES) for configuring validation budgets and policies.
Re-export parsing utilities (parseRelevanceDiagnosticsMode, parseValidatePolicy) to convert configuration strings into runtime policy enums.
Re-export policy resolution functions (defaultValidatePolicyForTask, resolveValidatePolicy) to determine effective validation policies for tasks.
Re-export task-mode and policy types to support type-safe usage by callers.
Provide a single import entry point that hides the internal structure of prompt-context submodules.
outOfScope: Prompt context construction (artifact building, checkpoints, budgets).
Direct access to prompt-context internals such as artifacts, budgets, diagnostics, trim, or deep implementation details.
invariants: Callers MUST import prompt policy utilities via this facade rather than reaching into prompt-context submodules directly.
All re-exported functions and constants produce the same behavior as their source definitions.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Reduce import coupling by centralizing prompt policy exports into a single stable facade, making refactors of prompt-context internals safer without affecting downstream consumers.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes to this file; the last commit was a general release gate sync.

publicSurface.description: Constant containing the set of budget profile names that trigger strict validation. Used by validation logic to enforce tight budgets.
Constant enumeration of all available validation policy names. Consumed by policy resolvers and configuration validation.
Constant mapping of budget profiles to their numeric or object budget definitions. Used to configure prompt token budgets per mode.
Parses a relevance diagnostics mode from a configuration string (e.g., 'on', 'off', 'summarize'). Returns the corresponding enum value.
Parses a validate policy from a configuration string (e.g., 'strict', 'normal', 'off'). Returns a ValidatePolicy enum.
Returns the default ValidatePolicy for a given task type. Used when no explicit policy is configured.
Resolves the effective validate policy by combining defaults and explicit configuration. Returns the policy to apply for a task.
